metaDesc: How institutions or individuals can request a factual correction to WPA materials.
title: Correction Request
deck: Request a factual correction to a WPA index, benchmark or analytical entry.
k002: Factual errors in a WPA index, benchmark or analytical entry — for example an incorrect name, date, affiliation, figure or mis-stated fact about an institution or person.
k004: Please provide a verifiable public source or official document that supports the correction. The clearer the evidence, the faster the editorial review.
k006: Send a correction request by email. Include the following details:
k007: The exact URL of the page or entry.
k012: Correction requests are handled in good faith and within reasonable editorial capacity. Submitting a request does not guarantee an automatic correction, and no immediate response is promised.
